item.title: Init
item.description: Well, I guess it’s live, folks.

item.title: $ whoami
item.description: Grigory Shipunov All my contacts are on keybase Student and part-time engeneer at Inorganic Chemistry Division, Chemistry Department, Lomonosov Moscow State University. Computer-tinkerer. Proud owner of a dog.
